message:
chore(beads): refine br-2bbt TUI V2 beads (pass 6 — code-verified stale reference fixes)

Fixed 4 stale references found during code-verified scan of all 49 beads:
- br-2bbt.11: VirtualDataSource -> DataProvider (matches br-2bbt.3.1 trait name)
- br-2bbt.11.4: VirtualDataSource/MessageDataSource -> TimelineDataProvider/MessageDataProvider
- br-2bbt.3.2: Corrected VirtualizedList API usage (::new(&slice).fixed_height(h))
- br-2bbt.3.3: SearchDataSource/ExplorerDataSource -> SearchDataProvider/ExplorerDataProvider

bv diagnostics: 0 cycles, 0 real priority misalignments, 2 suggestions (both false positives).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
